leadText: Pastel Veil (Japanese: パステルベール Pastel Veil) is an Ability introduced in Generation VIII. It is the signature Ability of Galarian Ponyta and Galarian Rapidash.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Pastel Veil prevents the Pokémon with this Ability and its allies from being afflicted by poison . It also heals the poisoned status condition of allies if a Pokémon with this Ability is sent out into battle. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Pastel Veil has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Pastel Veil prevents the Pokémon with this Ability and its allies from being afflicted by poison . It also heals the poisoned status condition of allies if a Pokémon with this Ability is sent out into battle.
